next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chain analysis
Acetylcholine receptor antibody testing and repetitive nerve stimulation
Cardiac MRI with T1 mapping and late gadolinium enhancement to assess for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid-pattern dysfunction
Polysomnography to evaluate for obesity hypoventilation and obstructive sleep apnea
Neurology consult for formal electromyography and nerve conduction studies
Consider abdominal fat pad biopsy if systemic protein studies are suggestive of amyloidosis
